prompt: Incrementally update the existing UPMv2-STATE block: mark T3 as completed, add new task T6 as pending. Do NOT overwrite the entire block — only update changed fields.

assertions.name: t3_updated_not_overwritten
assertions.description: T3 should be updated to completed; existing T1, T2 must be preserved

assertions.name: t6_added
assertions.description: New task T6 must appear in the updated state block

assertions.name: incremental_not_full_rewrite
assertions.description: Output should indicate incremental update, not full rewrite

assertions.name: updated_percentage
assertions.description: Percentage should reflect 3 completed out of 6 total = 50%
